name: laiwanya
description: 来玩吖 - 多人在线桌游平台 (Multiplayer Online Board Game Platform)

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npx vite --port 5173"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install

author: Kyle-Derrick
